summary: Iteration 20 testing complete. Backend: 26/27 tests passed (96%), 1 skipped. Frontend: All UI elements verified. New features tested: 9 sub-agents (research, outreach, offer, support, intake, planning, finance, design, qa), Audit system (health check + timeline), Customer Portal quote actions (accept/decline/revision endpoints), Customer Memory API, WhatsApp button geometry (desktop: flush left vertical, mobile: bottom-left pill).

minor.issue: Access link token lookup mismatch - stores token_hash but looks up by plain token field. Portal data retrieval may fail for some tokens.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix portal token lookup to use token_hash instead of plain token field in /api/portal/customer/{token} endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Admin sidebar has 11 navigation items (not 12 as mentioned in requirements) - Dashboard, Commercial, Leads, Kommunikation, AI-Chats, WhatsApp, Timeline, Kalender, Kunden, KI-Agenten, Audit
All 9 agents are correctly implemented and showing ACTIVE status
Audit health check returns all required fields: database, collections, agents, whatsapp, llm, recent_errors_24h, pricing
WhatsApp button geometry is correct - desktop: flush left (x=0), vertical text; mobile: bottom-left pill (bottom:140px, left:12px)
seed_data_creation: TEST_Portal_Iter20b quote created (q_ba44f4dcd380223d), TEST_memory_iter20 customer memory fact added
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified: (1) 9 sub-agents all active - research, outreach, offer, support, intake, planning, finance, design, qa, (2) Audit system with health cards (Gesamtstatus, Database, Collections, Agents, Whatsapp, Llm, Recent Errors 24h, Pricing) and timeline table, (3) Customer Portal quote actions (accept/decline/revision) - endpoints work but require valid token, (4) Customer Memory API working, (5) WhatsApp button geometry correct - desktop: flush left vertical, mobile: bottom-left pill at bottom:140px, (6) Admin sidebar has 11 nav items. Note: Portal token lookup has a minor issue where it looks for plain 'token' field but access_links store 'token_hash'.

admin_sidebar_navigation.details: 11 nav items: Dashboard, Commercial, Leads, Kommunikation, AI-Chats, WhatsApp, Timeline, Kalender, Kunden, KI-Agenten, Audit

ki_agenten_view.details: 9 agent cards (Research, Outreach, Offer, Support, Intake, Planning, Finance, Design, Qa) all showing ACTIVE status, orchestrator badge showing openai/gpt-5.2

audit_view.details: System-Audit with 8 health cards (Gesamtstatus: GESUND, Database: OK, Collections: OK, Agents: 9 aktiv, Whatsapp: RECONNECTING, Llm: OK, Recent Errors 24h: 0, Pricing: OK) and timeline table

audit_health_api.details: GET /api/admin/audit/health returns overall: healthy with all checks

agents_execute_api.details: POST /api/admin/agents/{agent}/execute works for intake and finance agents

customer_memory_api.details: POST /api/admin/customer-memory/{email}/facts adds memory facts, GET retrieves them

whatsapp_button_desktop.details: Flush left (x=0), vertical text (writing-mode: vertical-rl), border-radius: 10px 0px 0px 10px

whatsapp_button_mobile.details: Bottom-left pill (x=12, y=663, bottom:140px, left:12px), horizontal text, border-radius: 24px

whatsapp_button_hidden_admin.details: WhatsApp button not visible on /admin route

mocked_apis.whatsapp_qr_pairing: WhatsApp QR connector is a bridge solution - simulate-connect endpoint simulates connection
mocked_apis.quote_payment: Quote accept/decline endpoints work but no real payment integration yet
